jobs.name: ai-builder.md
jobs.role_title_zh: AI Builder · 多 agent 模拟 / 社会世界模型
jobs.role_title_en: AI Builder — multi-agent simulation / social world model
jobs.description_zh: renlab 在造 social intelligence——给 AI-native 组织的预测与协调底座。一个世界模型，两件事：社会模拟器把组织、它的 agent、外部人群在某个候选决策下向前推演；市场预测器预测外界如何回应。合起来是「组织决策的飞行模拟器」——先彩排，再下注。你的活：从 0 搭多 agent 模拟，让它跑出真实组织与人群的演化，再把这些模拟逐步沉淀成一个可训练的社会世界模型 (SWM)。研究味重，但必须能 ship。要求：Claude Code / agent 当日常 driver（不是偶尔用）、能独立把想法做成可跑的系统、对多 agent / 仿真 / 世界模型有真实手感。早期阶段，你写的就是产品。
jobs.description_en: renlab is building social intelligence — the prediction + coordination substrate for AI-native orgs. One world model, two products: a Social Simulator that runs your org, its agents, and the outside population forward under a candidate decision, and a Market Predictor that forecasts how the world responds. A flight simulator for org decisions — rehearse before you commit. You'll build multi-agent simulations from scratch, make them model how real orgs and populations evolve, then distill them into a trainable Social World Model (SWM). Research-heavy, but you must ship. Bar: Claude Code / agents as your daily driver, idea-to-running-system on your own, real intuition for multi-agent / simulation / world models. Early stage — what you write is the product.
